title: mentha × sicula
intro: Mentha × sicula, also known as Corn Mint, is a hybrid plant of the peppermint and spearmint species, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Its leaves and stems possess medicinal properties, rich in menthol and menthone, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of nausea and indigestion. The health benefits of Mentha × sicula include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe headaches, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. This herb can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
